_comment: Copy this file to netconfig.json and fill in your values. Keys: ssh_user (string, default username for switch SSH); baud_rates (list, shown under each detected serial port); profiles (list of static-IP profiles applied via networksetup, one click each). Profile fields: name (required), ip (required, e.g. '10.0.0.5/24' or '10.0.0.5'), subnet (required if ip has no /CIDR; '255.255.255.0' or '24'), router (optional; omit or empty for no default gateway), dns (optional list; omit to leave DNS untouched, [] to clear back to DHCP-supplied).
